orchestrator-baseline.notes: Soft limits are trend signals. Hard limits protect CI from hangs and runaway resource use.

validation-host-smoke.notes: One bounded scenario covers configuration rejection, executed PASS, exact input+contract cache hit, validation-contract cache miss, timeout cleanup, and generated syntax failure.

agent-runtime-smoke.notes: One fast-profile lifecycle covers deterministic routing, compact low-risk budgets, executor, validation, review bundle, final reviewer/sentinel, high-risk watchdog escalation, critical human handoff, stale-risk dispatch rejection, and final handoff.
